description: Create a tiered product display pedestal in FreeCAD as a single fused solid with a central cable routing hole. The assembly consists of a 200x200x15 mm base centered on the Z-axis (Z=0 to 15), a 40mm radius cylinder column 150mm high sitting on the base (starting at Z=15), and a 70mm radius cylinder top platform 12mm high sitting on the column (starting at Z=165). Perform a boolean union on these parts and cut a 15mm diameter hole through the entire center along the Z-axis. Save the final result to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/display_pedestal.FCStd.
